CustomField.description: Total page count of the NEPA document package for this process. CE documents median 3-8 pages; EA 30-200; EIS 200+. Strong numeric discriminator (lift 0.68 in NEPATEC corpus). Used by CE Screener as a confidence modifier and by QA rules to flag implausibly thin documents.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Total pages in the NEPA document package. CE: typically 3-8 pages; EA: 30-200; EIS: 200+.
CustomField.label: Total Pages
